messages.text:
OFFER: price=50
I appreciate your offer of 45 ZUP. I propose 50 ZUP for the object X. This is a fair price close to your offer and within my budget. What do you think?

RAW_UPSTREAM_RESPONSE:
<proposal count> 1 </proposal count>
<my resources> ZUP: 1000 </my resources>
<my goals> Buy resources with <ZUP>. You are willing to pay at most X: 100 ZUP for the resources. </my goals>
<reason> The seller proposes 45 ZUP for the object X, which is well below my maximum willingness to pay of 100 ZUP. This is a good starting offer. I will propose a slightly higher price to show willingness to negotiate but still keep the price favorable for me. </reason>
<player answer> PROPOSAL </player answer>
<newly proposed trade>Player RED Gives X: 1 | Player BLUE Gives ZUP: 50</newly proposed trade>
